yanova — ai-ops — prod

$ yanova deploy --cluster eks-prod --region us-east-1

✓ VPC + Subnets configured [us-east-1]

✓ IAM Roles provisioned [EKS]

✓ EKS Cluster created [v1.30]

✓ Node Groups (3 nodes) [running]

✓ Monitoring + Logging [active]

✓ Deployment complete! [42s]

→ https://eks-prod.yanovalabs.com

AI Ops Active
↑ 99.9% uptime

Powered by modern cloud stack

About Us

About Yanova AI Labs

Yanova AI Labs is an AI-powered enterprise platform company focused on automating infrastructure, operations, analytics and compliance. Founded by Venkat Yanapothula, a 12+ year veteran in DevOps, Cloud, and Automation.

We believe every enterprise deserves intelligent automation — from one-click Kubernetes deployments to AI-driven operations and market intelligence.

12+
Years Experience
DevOps & Cloud
AI First
Platform
Built for Enterprises
Enterprise
Grade Security
SOC 2 Ready
Global
Vision
Expanding Worldwide

Yanova OneClick

One-Click Kubernetes Cluster Deployment

Deploy production-ready EKS clusters in minutes. No manual configuration, no complexity.

☁️

1

Select Cloud

⚙️

2

Configure

🚀

3

Click Deploy

✅

4

Cluster Ready

What's included

✓ VPC, Subnets, IAM Roles
✓ EKS Cluster, Node Groups
✓ Monitoring, Logging, Ingress
✓ Secure, Scalable, Reliable
Learn More

Cluster Architecture

Network Layer

VPCPublic SubnetsPrivate SubnetsNAT Gateway

Compute Layer

EKS Control PlaneNode Groups (Auto-scaling)EC2 Instances

Platform Layer

Monitoring (Prometheus)Logging (CloudWatch)Ingress (NGINX)
Deployment time: ~42 seconds
